title: DOG SERVICES - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS COUNTY DOG SERVICES DOG SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides adoption of dogs, picks up strays, handles nuisance complaints, and provides licensing services. Also offers microchipping and rabies vaccinations for licensed dogs. 13141 SE Highway 212 Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Administration: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Adoption Viewing: Tuesday-Friday 1pm-4pm Email (503) 655-8628 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 722-6519 Main phone Shelter (503) 655-8628 Main phone (503) 557-2829 FAX Main phone (503) 655-8628 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Appointments are encouraged for accepting stray dogs or reclaiming your dog. FEES: Visit website to confirm acceptance of strays. Call for information or email to make an appointment, accept a stray dog, or reclaim a lost dog. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Animal Adoption Animal Control Animal Licenses Animal Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS COUNTY DOG SERVICES
